title: MessageCreateInput.body_type has no documentation of valid values
description: MessageCreateInput.body_type (methods/mod.rs) is a &str with no doc comment and no guidance on what values the spec permits. A contributor integrating at 2am will guess a MIME type, pass the wrong value, and receive an opaque server-side rejection with no actionable client-side message. Fix: add a doc comment listing the spec-defined allowed values (e.g. "text/plain", "text/markdown") and a note that invalid values will produce a server MethodError.
